HGSS.404.0002:
Drama and documentary!
This is the Variety Hour Guy!
HGSS.404.0003:
The Variety Channel that’s a treasure
chest filled with laughter and tears!
HGSS.404.0004:
Buena: Hello, everyone! It’s Buena!
Time for today’s password!
Today’s password is...
[3412,0000,0000]!
Don’t forget it!
I’m looking forward to your visiting
me at the Goldenrod City Radio Tower!
HGSS.404.0005:
Buena: Hello, everyone! It’s Buena!
All my listeners out there, have you gone
to the Goldenrod City Radio Tower to get
your Blue Card yet? Remember the
password we announce on the show, and
go to the Goldenrod City Radio Tower.
If you come visit me on the second floor
and tell me the password, you’ll get
points on your card! Collect enough
points, and you can turn them in for
some great prizes! Try your best to
gather points, everyone!
